title: Senior Teacher - Manipal University - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Manipal University - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Manipal University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Manipal University:
Manipal University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal University!
